pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates Site ID 1, verifier.py operates on idsite=1
setup_task.sh line 36: for DATE in 2025-03-17; verifier.py comments confirm date
verifier.py lines 6-7 and 100 confirm pattern; task description mentions 'Spring Promo Campaign Launch'
verifier.py line 96-99: first annotation (i==0) requires starred==true for full 35 pts; task description marks as **Starred**
verifier.py line 7 and task description confirm pattern
verifier.py line 104-106 and task.json line 27; annotation 2 scored as 20 pts regardless of starred status
verifier.py line 8 and task description confirm pattern
task.json line 32; annotation 3 scored as 20 pts regardless of starred status
verifier.py line 62: score += 10 for current_count > initial_count
verifier.py line 99: pts = 35 when i==0 and starred matches
verifier.py line 105: pts = 20 for annotation at i==1
verifier.py line 105: pts = 20 for annotation at i==2
verifier.py line 117: score += 15 when all 3 matches found and score == 85
docker-compose.yml line 26: image: matomo:5; Confirmed as current version by web search showing Matomo 5.8.0 released 2026-03-04

privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating three date annotations in a Matomo analytics instance on Site ID 1. The three annotations are: (1) 2025-03-17 with text pattern 'Spring Promo' marked as starred, (2) 2025-04-01 with text pattern 'Email Blast' not starred, and (3) 2025-04-14 with text pattern 'Homepage Redesign' not starred. The task uses Matomo version 5 running in Docker with MariaDB 10.11 as the database backend. All data is synthetic and generated by setup scripts. Scoring awards 10 points for interaction, 35 points for the first annotation when perfect with correct starred status, 20 points each for the second and third annotations, and a 15-point bonus when all three annotations are created perfectly. Minimum passing score is 60 points.
